profile.name: Vigneshwar Pasupathi
profile.tagline: I build fast, accessible, and well-crafted web applications.

paragraphs: I am a Senior Full Stack Engineer with {{totalYears}}+ years in engineering and {{softwareYears}}+ years in software — building production-grade applications across the full stack. Through deliberate AI exploration, I learnt to leverage AI-assisted development to ship products faster, write cleaner code, and reach solutions I wouldn't have found alone.

Beyond code, I am engaged in the Toastmasters community — serving as Registration Chair for the Illuminate 2024 Semi Annual Conference and receiving the Contributor Award from Wake-Up Chennai Toastmasters Club. I believe the same discipline that makes a good speaker makes a good engineer: clarity, preparation, and the courage to iterate.

Away from the keyboard, I am an automobile enthusiast who geeks out over engineering and design, an architecture aficionado who finds inspiration in how spaces are crafted, and a DIY freak who believes the best way to understand something is to build it yourself.

meta.siteDescription: Portfolio of Vigneshwar Pasupathi, Senior Full Stack Engineer with 10+ years of experience in React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL.
